name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M12579 This CarryAll Cargo small handbag is crafted from soft lambskin with a stylish wrinkled effect. Paired with polished metal hardware and a relaxed silhouette against a deep background, it is a versatile choice for day and night. Features a detachable shoulder strap and chain strap for multiple styling options. 33.5 x 23 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)
